query:
SELECT rp.id, rp.categoryId, rp.feedItemId, fi.name as feedItemName,
  (SELECT ph.pricePerUnit FROM feed_item_price_history ph WHERE ph.feedItemId = rp.feedItemId ORDER BY ph.effectiveDate DESC, ph.id DESC LIMIT 1) as currentPrice
FROM ration_plans rp
LEFT JOIN feed_items fi ON fi.id = rp.feedItemId
WHERE rp.isActive = 1 AND rp.deletedAt IS NULL
LIMIT 10;
